nodes.itemHTML: • Mouselessstars51 - Keyboard shortcut training and look-up.
• Glyphfinderstars70 - Unicode character search.
• GitHub Codeowners Validatorstars67 - Ensures the correctness of your GitHub CODEOWNERS file. It supports public and private GitHub repositories and also GitHub Enterprise installations.
• selenestars3 - Project template for writing games in Moonscript instead of Lua without precompiling

• Vue 3 example without Webpack - An example of how to build a Vue app with Vue-Router without the need for Webpack or any other build tool. Includes the ability to prerender components and pages with Vue Server Renderer.
• The First Blazor Dock Manager - September 15, 2020 - This article shows how to use the brand-new Dock Manager component in the Ignite UI for Web Components product. Source codestars4 .

• Making Scott Hanselman's Powerpoint Greenscreen trick work with RevealJS via Blazor Server - September 15, 2020 - Making Scott Hanselman's Powerpoint Greenscreen trick work with RevealJS via Blazor Server. Source codestars3 .
• BlazorChifoumistars0 - Exploring machine learning with a Chifoumi game.
• Build a web app with Blazor WebAssembly and Visual Studio Code - Build a web app with Blazor WebAssembly and Visual Studio Code, on Microsoft Learn.
• vue-js-datatablestars6 - VueJS light weight wrapper datatable component for datatables.net
• vue-jquery-calendarstars1 - VueJS light weight wrapper component for jquery ui datepicker
• Outlook.com - Free personal email and calendar

• agnoster - Optimized for solarized terminal color schemes, shows git decorations, user@host, working directory, the previous command's exit status and whether you are running with root privileges. Requires a Powerline-compatible font.
• clean (akz92)stars7 - Minimalist ZSH theme.
• dr4kk0nnys_v2stars0 - Works well on dark backgrounds, includes git status decorations.
• fdT2Kstars0- Based on agnosterstars3.1k, preset to include virtualenv, last command status, nvm, docker machine and git, hg and bzr status decorations.
• geometrystars778 - A minimal ZSH theme where any function can be added to the left prompt or (async) right prompt on the fly.
• iGeekstars0 - Modified iGeek theme. Works with macOS out-of the box, includes git status decorations.
• jhleeemestars2 - Includes git and python virtualenv status decorations, user, pwd,time and system name.
• minimal-improvedstars14 - Theme for dark terminals, includes git decorations in the right-side prompt.
• minimal2stars10 - A minimal and extensible ZSH theme. Forked from subnixr's originalstars219 and adapted for Zimfwstars2k.
• seti_UXstars1 - A simple omz-compatible theme with a corresponding iTerm 2 color scheme.
• solarized-powerline (houjunchen)stars10 - Solarized powerline-style theme for ZSH.
• thetastars9 - Includes git and hg status decorations. Also has java, python, ruby, node, go and elixir version information.
• abbr-pathstars6 - Adds functionality of the theme_title_use_abbreviated_path parameter from some oh-my-fish themes.
• artisanstars111 - Laravel artisan plugin for ZSH to help you to run artisan from anywhere in the project tree, with tab completion!
• expandstars5 - Expands regular aliases, global aliases, incorrect spellings and phrases, globs, history expansion and $parameters with the spacebar key.
• firebase (rmrs)stars5 - Add an indicator in the prompt that you're in a directory with a firebase.json file (aka "firebase project").
• fzf-widgetsstars75 - Adds some ZLE widgets for fzfstars36.6k.

• gitstars14 - Replacement for the stock oh-my-zsh git plugin. Provides quite a few useful aliases and functions. The motivation to replace the default plugin stems from the fact that it comes with some inconsistencies that make a few popular commands rather unintuitive, so this plugin makes the aliases consistent.
• goenv (bbenne10)stars5 - Manage $GOPATH similarly to Python's virtualenvwrapper.
• hubstars9 - ZSH plugin for forking model.
• jvmstars4 - Allows selection of JDK on macOS.
• rbenv (jsahlen)stars0 - Variant based on the original oh-my-zsh rbenv plugin.
• ztracestars13 - Catches output of commands, allows to reuse that output, glue it with history content.
• zuistars99 - ZSH User Interface library – CGI+DHTML-like rapid TUI application development with ZSH.
• laboratory — A simple, expressive unit test framework for Rust
• CartolaFC - Popular brazilian fantasy football (from 2014 to 2017).
• Dota Underlord Perfect Buildstars0 - An app to help build optimal deck in Dota Underlord.
• skorchstars3.9k - A scikit-learn compatible neural network library that wraps PyTorch.
• Dynamic Datastars1.1k - Reactive Extensions (Rx) for collections
• Unchase.OpenAPI.Connectedservicestars47 - A Visual Studio 2017/2019 extension to generate C# (TypeScript) HttpClient (or C# Controllers) code for OpenAPI web service with NSwagstars4.3k.
• Fluent NHibernatestars1.6k - Fluent, XML-less, compile safe, automated, convention-based mappings for NHibernate.
• Empty Keys UI - Multi-platform and multi-engine XAML based user interface library [Free][Proprietary]
• VsVIMstars3.1k - VIM in Visual Studio
• FlaUIstars931 - FlaUI is a .NET library which helps with automated UI testing of Windows applications (Win32, WinForms, WPF, Store Apps, ...).
• SmartCodestars470 - SmartCode = IDataSource -> IBuildTask -> IOutput => Build Everything!!! (Including [Code generator])
• Papercutstars1.9k - Papercut is an open source (.NET based) test email viewer that runs locally with a built-in SMTP server designed to receive and notify of test email messages.
• Open Live Writerstars2.4k - Blog writer which integrated with WordPress, Blogger, et. al. Open Live Writer makes it easy to write, preview, and post to your blog.
• Verifystars286 - Verification tool to enable simple approval of complex models and documents.
• ProtoBufstars259 - Generate C# code for protocol buffer serialization from a .proto specification.
• Cloudsmith - A fully managed package management SaaS, with support for NuGet, Npm, Docker and much more. [Free for Public/OSS] [$]
• Rantstars3.1k - The Rant Procedural Text Generation DSL
• pinvokestars1.3k - A library containing P/Invoke code for latest Windows OS.
• ResX Resource Managerstars715 - The most popular free tool to localize all kind of applications with resx-based resources.
• Swashbucklestars3k - Seamlessly adds a Swagger to Web API projects.
• MSBuildstars4.5k - The Microsoft Build Engine (MSBuild) is the build platform for .NET and Visual Studio
• Logibit Hawkstars37 - A F# Hawkstars1.9k authentication library
• OpenWaybackstars389 - The open source project aimed to develop Wayback Machine, the key software used by web archives worldwide to play back archived websites in the user's browser. (Stable)
• PyWbstars820 - A Python (2 and 3) implementation of web archival replay tools, sometimes also known as 'Wayback Machine'. (Stable)
• ReplayWeb.Page - A browser-based, fully client-side replay engine for both local and remote WARC files.
• 🔥 Firebase Developers Discord - an open community dedicated to Firebase and its services, where you can to socialize and help other web and app developers from around the world.
